stories.name: alert-dialog-component
stories.title: Add AlertDialog shadcn/ui component
stories.description: Scaffold src/components/ui/alert-dialog.tsx using the @radix-ui/react-alert-dialog primitive already present in node_modules. Follow the same pattern as the existing dialog.tsx wrapper. No functional behavior — this is a pure UI primitive story.

includes: Export: AlertDialog, AlertDialogTrigger, AlertDialogContent, AlertDialogHeader, AlertDialogFooter, AlertDialogTitle, AlertDialogDescription, AlertDialogAction, AlertDialogCancel
excludes: No usage in other components yet
No tests for the component itself

e2e_test_plan.notes: No E2E scenario for this story — it is a pure UI primitive. E2E coverage comes in stories 02 and 03.

stories.notes: radix-ui/react-alert-dialog is already in node_modules (available transitively). Copy the shadcn/ui alert-dialog component pattern.

stories.name: delete-task
stories.title: Add Delete Task UI and dispatch
stories.description: Add a Delete button (Trash2 icon, data-testid='task-delete-btn') to TaskCard. Board holds the AlertDialog confirmation state. On confirm (data-testid='task-delete-confirm'), dispatch a task.deleted event via the existing dispatch() mechanism. Add E2E test for delete task flow.

includes: src/components/TaskCard.tsx: add onDelete prop + Trash2 button
src/components/Board.tsx: add handleDelete(), AlertDialog state, pass onDelete to TaskCard at both mobile+desktop call sites
e2e/tests/tasks.spec.ts: add delete task test case
excludes: No changes to task-events.ts or task-reducer.ts (already complete)

scenarios.name: Delete a task
steps: Create a group + create a task (reuse existing helpers)
Click Cancel → assert task still in [data-column='open']
Assert task title no longer present in any [data-column] within 10s

stories.notes: Depends on story 01 (AlertDialog component). Board must track pendingDeleteTaskId state for the dialog. Use isMobile guard and .first() on locators per existing E2E conventions.

stories.name: leave-group
stories.title: Add Leave Group UI and marmot integration
stories.description: Add a Leave button (LogOut icon, data-testid='group-leave-btn', always visible) to each group item in GroupManager. On confirm (data-testid='group-leave-confirm'): call client.leaveGroup(groupId), call clearEvents(groupId), call onGroupLeft() callback. Page resets selectedGroupId to null. Error shown inline. Add E2E test for leave group flow.

includes: src/components/GroupManager.tsx: add onGroupLeft prop + LogOut icon button per group item + AlertDialog confirmation + leaveGroup call + clearEvents call + inline error
app/page.tsx: add onGroupLeft handler that calls setSelectedGroupId(null)
e2e/tests/groups.spec.ts: add leave group test case
excludes: No changes to persistence.ts (clearEvents already correct)

scenarios.name: Leave a group
steps: Create a group, assert it appears in sidebar
Click Cancel → assert group still in sidebar
Assert group name no longer in sidebar within 15s
Assert board/task heading not visible (group deselected)

stories.notes: Depends on story 01 (AlertDialog component). GroupManager needs onGroupLeft?: () => void prop; page.tsx wires it. After client.leaveGroup() succeeds, groupsUpdated fires automatically removing the group from the list. clearEvents() must be called before or after leaveGroup() — call after success to avoid clearing if network fails.

dependency_notes: Story 01 (AlertDialog) must complete before 02 and 03 since both use it. Stories 02 and 03 are independent of each other after 01.
mock_resolution_plan: No temporary mocks introduced. All stories use real implementations.
